zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume I de Bellême於0970年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內貝爾達惠斯時，他的父親Ives de Creil30歲，母親Godehilde de Ponthieu32歲。他於大約0988年與Mathilde de Ganelon在法國巴-諾門迪奧內貝爾e結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1028年在法國諾門迪奧內多福洛特享年58歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪奧內多福洛特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume I de Bellême was born in 0970, in Berd'huis, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Ives de Creil, was 30 and his mother, Godehilde de Ponthieu, was 32. He married Mathilde de Ganelon about 0988, in Bellême, Orne, Lower Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1028, in Domfront, Orne, Normandy, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Domfront, Orne, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume I de Bellême est né en 0970, à Berd'huis, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Ives de Creil, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Godehilde de Ponthieu, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Ganelon environ 0988, à Bellême, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1028, à Domfront, Orne, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume I de Bellême 0970 in Berd'huis, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ives de Creil 30 und seine Mutter Godehilde de Ponthieu 32. Er hat um 0988 in Bellême, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich Mathilde de Ganelon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1028 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Mathilde de Ganelon circa 0988, nel Bellême, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1028, nel Domfront, Orne, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume I de Bellêmeが0970年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンバード'ハイスで生まれた時，父Ives de Creilは30歳，母Godehilde de Ponthieuは32歳であった。約0988年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンベルeメでMathilde de Ganelonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1028年にフランスノーマンディオルンドムフロントで58歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンドムフロントにて埋葬された。

ko.Notre Dame, Delaware, United States: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 그랜드 이슬일 노트르 다
ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume I de Bellême(이)가 0970년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 버드'후이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ives de Creil(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Godehilde de Ponthieu(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 0988년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 브e에서 Mathilde de Ganelon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1028년 프랑스 노먼디 른 돔프론트에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 돔프론트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume I de Bellême nasceu em 0970, em Berd'huis, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Ives de Creil, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Godehilde de Ponthieu, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Ganelon aproximadamente 0988, em Bellême, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1028, em Domfront, Orne, Normandie, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Domfront, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.Notre Dame, Delaware, United States: нотр дэм, гранд исл, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume I de Bellême родился в 0970 г. в местности бирд'хуиз, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Ives de Creil было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Godehilde de Ponthieu, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Ganelon около 0988 г. в местности беллeм, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1028 г. в местности домфронт, орн, норманди, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности домфронт, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция.
